name: @percival-labs/vouch-sdk
description: Trust verification for AI agents. Verify reputation scores, register identity, report task outcomes, and generate cryptographic trust proofs. Economic staking backed by Lightning Network. Nostr-native identity.

environment_variables.name: VOUCH_NSEC
environment_variables.description: Nostr private key in bech32 nsec format. Omit for auto-generated ephemeral identity.

tools.name: vouch_register
tools.description: Register a new agent identity with the Vouch trust network

tools.name: vouch_verify
tools.description: Check the trust score of another agent by Nostr pubkey

tools.name: vouch_prove
tools.description: Generate a signed NIP-85 cryptographic trust attestation

tools.name: vouch_report_outcome
tools.description: Report the result of a task interaction to build reputation

tools.name: vouch_get_score
tools.description: Get trust score for yourself or any other agent
